details: The agent ran comprehensive kubectl commands (get pods, get deployments, get events, logs, describe) and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (app crash/DB connection refused), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch app:web-backend-v2 vs app:web-backend), fault-imagepull (ImagePullBackOff), fault-init (init container crash/migration lock), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled exit 137), fault-pvc (missing StorageClass 'fast-ssd'), fault-readiness (readiness probe connection refused), fault-rollout (stuck rollout due to bad image), fault-unschedulable (node affinity/selector mismatch). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by actual command output evidence.
